title: Create: Reforged Foundations
description: Enables logical crafting of many Minecraft blocks and items, expanding production possibilities especially for flatworld or skyblock while staying consistent with Create’s balance.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4d36ddf83c98735e00a0c6118a2d127e3b8b4dd_0.webp)
![Splash](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb6f4bdb76836c48c5109d7759065cc58489d35d.png)

Create: Reforged Foundations makes it possible to craft numerous Minecraft blocks and objects. The different recipes try to maintain a certain logic and balance in relation to the recipes already available in the Create mod.

This mod may be perceived as a facility too inconsistent with Minecraft, but its real purpose is to offer the possibility of creating many new production lines for your different needs.

It can also be very useful for people wishing to start their adventure on a flatworld or skybox. While it doesn't add a new type of gameplay, it does expand the range of blocks and items you can obtain. 

![Splash](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb6f4bdb76836c48c5109d7759065cc58489d35d.png)

Many recipes have been added to obtain blocks that would normally be impossible to make.
The ability to make spawn eggs for all the mobs in the game and use them in the vanilla spawner, which can also be manufactured.
All the ores in the game can be automated via different crafts, without being too easy to obtain at the start of the game.
Alternative recipes for many blocks and objects, to facilitate the automation of more complex recipes.

![preview1](https://i.imgur.com/fZlJG53.gif)

![preview2](https://i.imgur.com/wC9SqIG.gif)

![preview3](https://i.imgur.com/JIXsA6q.gif)

![preview4](https://i.imgur.com/3FxEd5d.gif)

![preview5](https://i.imgur.com/3dqA6aB.gif)

![preview6](https://i.imgur.com/sqseNsQ.gif)

![Splash](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb6f4bdb76836c48c5109d7759065cc58489d35d.png)


The images in the gallery only give a brief overview of all the available recipes. We strongly recommend using a mod such as JEI or EMI to discover the full range of recipes.

The mod is likely to evolve according to your feedback or suggestions, so don't hesitate to give your opinion.

![Splash](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb6f4bdb76836c48c5109d7759065cc58489d35d.png)
